source.description: Initial adjustable damage formula provided by community datamining and player testing.

formula.perHitExpression: ((((primaryAttack * (1 - resistance)) + refinedOrElementalAttack) * skillMultiplier) + flatDamage) * critMultiplier * (1 + versatilityDamagePct) * (1 + elementalDamagePct) * (1 + genericDamagePct)

primaryAttack.label: ATK/MATK
primaryAttack.description: Physical skills are expected to use ATK and magical skills are expected to use MATK. The skill or damage row must identify which side applies.

resistance.label: Resistance
resistance.description: Target resistance multiplier. Formula currently treats this as a decimal where 10% resistance is 0.10. Resistance break/down effects can be tested through same-hit observed deltas even when the raw target resistance snapshot is not available.

targetArmorMitigation.label: Armor / Defense Mitigation
targetArmorMitigation.description: Hypothesis term for target armor/defense reduction such as Armor Break, Defense Break, Shattered Armor, or target defense down. The exact formula position is not validated yet; current parser estimates use matching-hit observed deltas when a clean outside-window baseline exists.

refinedOrElementalAttack.label: Refined/Elemental ATK
refinedOrElementalAttack.description: Flat refined or elemental attack added after resistance is applied to ATK/MATK.

skillMultiplier.label: Multiplier
skillMultiplier.description: Skill or damage-row coefficient. This should come from Recount/DamageAttr/skill formula sources once mapped.

flatDamage.label: Flat Damage
flatDamage.description: Flat damage added after the skill multiplier.

critMultiplier.label: CRIT
critMultiplier.description: Expected to be 1 for non-critical hits and the character's crit-damage multiplier for critical hits.

versatilityDamagePct.label: Versatility DMG %
versatilityDamagePct.description: Decimal percent damage bonus from versatility-derived damage.

elementalDamagePct.label: Elemental DMG %
elementalDamagePct.description: Decimal percent damage bonus for the skill or damage row's element.

genericDamagePct.label: Generic DMG %
genericDamagePct.description: Generic damage bonuses, including target-qualified bonuses such as damage to elites or bosses when their predicates match.

baseAttack.label: Base Attack
baseAttack.description: Stat-derived base damage before skill coefficients.

targetMitigation.label: Target Mitigation
targetMitigation.description: Target-side reduction or amplification that changes the resisted or mitigated base value.

skillCoefficient.label: Skill Coefficient
skillCoefficient.description: Damage-row coefficient and flat skill damage.

genericDamage.label: Generic Damage
genericDamage.description: Generic, skill-specific, source-specific, and target-qualified percent damage.

hitTiming.label: Hit Timing
hitTiming.description: Not a per-hit formula term. Used for effects that change casts, cooldowns, attack speed, animation speed, or hit count.

procDamage.label: Proc Damage
procDamage.description: Not a parent-hit multiplier. Used for effects that create separate damage rows or extra hits.

neededForExactContribution: attacker stat snapshot at hit time
target resistance snapshot at hit time
target armor/defense snapshot at hit time or matching-hit observed delta baseline
skill coefficient mapping by damage id
damage element mapping by damage id
target predicate evaluation, such as elite-or-stronger
source predicate evaluation, such as companion or summon

lucky.description: Hits currently carry a lucky flag, but the community formula does not define where lucky enters the damage equation.

defense.description: The community formula describes resistance but does not yet identify a validated separate defense or armor term. Armor/defense break effects are modeled as targetArmorMitigation candidates and can be estimated through same-hit baseline-vs-active deltas.
